title: Privacy Policy

paragraphs: Zar Venture Real Estate ("we", "our", "us") is committed to protecting and respecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website, submit enquiries, or use our services related to real estate transactions in India and abroad.
By accessing or using our website and services, you agree to the terms of this Privacy Policy.

sections.title: Information We Collect
sections.content: We may collect the following types of information:

subsections.title: Personal Information
items: Full name
Contact details (mobile number, email address)
Residential address
PAN card details (where legally required)
Passport details (for international / Dubai property transactions)
Financial or investment preferences (budget range, property type)

sections.title: How We Use Your Information
sections.content: We use the collected information for the following purposes:
items: To respond to enquiries and provide requested services
To assist with property buying, selling, leasing, and investment advisory
To comply with legal, regulatory, and compliance requirements
To process documentation and coordinate transactions
To improve our website, services, and customer experience
To send relevant updates, property options, and marketing communications (with consent)

sections.title: Sharing and Disclosure of Information
sections.content: We do not sell or rent your personal information. We may share your information only in the following cases:
items: With trusted partners such as developers, banks, legal advisors, and registration authorities, strictly for service delivery
With government or regulatory authorities when required by law
With service providers who support our website and operations under confidentiality obligations

sections.title: Data Security
sections.content: We implement reasonable administrative, technical, and physical safeguards to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, misuse, alteration, or disclosure. While we strive to protect your data, no method of transmission over the internet is completely secure.

sections.title: Cookies Policy
sections.content: Our website may use cookies to:
items: Enhance user experience
Analyse website traffic and usage patterns
Improve content and performance
sections.additionalContent: You may choose to disable cookies through your browser settings; however, some features of the website may not function properly.

sections.title: Data Retention
sections.content: We retain personal information only for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this Privacy Policy or to comply with legal and regulatory obligations.

sections.title: Your Rights
sections.content: Subject to applicable laws, you have the right to:
items: Access the personal information we hold about you
Request correction or updating of your information
Withdraw consent for marketing communications
Request deletion of your personal data, subject to legal requirements
sections.additionalContent: To exercise these rights, please contact us using the details below.

sections.title: Third-Party Links
sections.content: Our website may contain links to third-party websites. We are not responsible for the privacy practices or content of such external websites. We encourage users to review the privacy policies of those sites.

sections.title: Compliance with Laws
sections.content: We comply with applicable data protection laws, including:
items: Information Technology Act, 2000 and related rules (India)
Applicable UAE data protection regulations (where relevant)

sections.title: Changes to This Privacy Policy
sections.content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with a revised effective date.

disclaimer: This Privacy Policy is a general template and does not constitute legal advice. For complete compliance, consultation with a legal professional is recommended.
